_note: Synthetic fraud BidResponse — invisible-overlay click trap. The adm payload renders a visible banner image AND a transparent fullscreen <div> on top of it. Any click anywhere in the iframe lands on the trap div, not on the visible image. The Behavior probe (public/creative-probe.js) flags this as `invisible_overlay_click`; the engine (packages/core/behavior) promotes it to a `behavior.trap.invisible_overlay` finding (severity: error). Used as truth-ground for the heuristic during Phase 1.
